name: Scramblers Golf Club - North Mount Pleasant
address: 3377 S Morgans Point Rd Suite 405, Mt Pleasant, SC 29466
about: Scramblers Golf is a private member-only golf simulation club focused on game improvement, access, and community. The venues feature top-tier technology for both practice and play, offering 24/7 access to simulator bays for members to analyze their swings or play over 100 virtual courses. The experience is centered on providing affordable, convenient golf practice and play with a focus on data-driven improvement through best-in-class launch monitors and simulation software.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to premium simulator bays allows for flexible practice anytime
High-fidelity Uneekor launch monitors provide accurate, detailed swing data
GSPro software offers realistic ball physics and access to hundreds of user-created courses

food_and_drink.notes: Members are permitted to bring their own food into the facility
Members are permitted to bring their own drinks into the facility

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-tier camera and infrared-based launch monitor providing detailed club and ball data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary golf equipment, but members are welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as a private club, members are allowed to bring in their own food and drinks, though they must be respectful and clean up after themselves.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies depending on the course and number of players, but simulator rounds typically take 1.5 to 2 hours for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Scramblers is a private member club focused on adult golfers. While children of members may visit, the primary experience and technology are geared toward adults and serious golfers.
